query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "multi-turn reflective masking elicits reasoning in mask diffusion mode" linguistics
rationale: The paper focuses on the high-level categorization and governance of AI deception (strategic deception, sycophancy) rather than the specific mechanism of "Multi-Turn Reflective Masking" or the "Mask Diffusion Mode" architecture mentioned in the user's question. While both involve LLMs, the candidate paper does not measure the same biological/algorithmic mechanism, establish a baseline for the specific masking technique, or serve as a foundational reference for the "Mask Diffusion" framework, thu
